releases.title: Foundation contradiction audit baseline
releases.summary: Mapped core docs/runtime contradictions into one baseline matrix so implementation starts from verified truth instead of assumptions and silent drift.
releases.details: Introduced a contradiction audit artifact to identify and prioritize the biggest truth gaps between docs, config, scripts, and runtime behavior.
manual: Apply remediation in order from highest impact.

releases.title: Unified readiness gate
releases.summary: Added a single PASS/FAIL readiness gate that combines config checks, runtime probes, and doctor signals to block unsafe launches and releases.
releases.details: Created scripts/oc-readiness and npm run readiness so operators have one deterministic go/no-go command.
manual: If FAIL, inspect reported critical findings.
Fix issues and rerun until PASS.

releases.title: Miniapp contract v1
releases.summary: Locked a canonical miniapp contract schema with versioning and governance rules so all new functions follow one consistent, reviewable standard.
releases.details: Added miniapp-contract-v1.md and linked lifecycle/workflow requirements to enforce one miniapp shape across delivery.
manual: Author miniapp metadata using the v1 schema.
Ensure docs and registry stay aligned.

releases.title: Function registry + validator
releases.summary: Implemented machine-readable miniapp registry plus schema validator to keep function contracts consistent, typed, and automatically verifiable over time.
releases.details: Added functions/registry.v1.json and scripts/validate-function-registry.mjs with npm run registry:validate.

releases.title: Dashboard runtime modularization
releases.summary: Refactored dashboard runtime helpers out of server monolith into reusable module, reducing coupling and enabling safer incremental feature delivery.
releases.details: Extracted runScript, launchDetached, and readJson into dashboard/lib/runtime.mjs and wired server import usage.
manual: Keep server route logic separate from helper internals.
Run dashboard and smoke-test command actions.

releases.title: Issue quality standard + ready gate
releases.summary: Defined strict issue quality format and ready-gate checklist so board items are implementation-ready, testable, and objectively reviewable before coding.
releases.details: Added issue-quality-standard.md and issue-ready-gate-checklist.md with mandatory sections and status transition rules.
manual: Draft issue with all required sections.
Attach evidence when moving to Review.

releases.title: Channel adapter contract + lifecycle
releases.summary: Established one adapter contract and lifecycle for all channels to standardize ingress, policy, dispatch, egress, and delivery-state visibility.
releases.details: Added channel-adapter-contract-v1.md and channel-adapter-lifecycle-v1.md as cross-channel foundation documents.
manual: Normalize channel events to canonical shape.
Enforce lifecycle stages without silent skips.

releases.title: API reference adapter implementation
releases.summary: Built reference API adapter implementing lifecycle stages and policy checks, plus a dedicated miniapp and API route for operator inspection.
releases.details: Implemented dashboard/lib/api-channel-adapter.mjs; HTTP POST /api/functions/api-channel-adapter; dashboard page /700/API_channel_adapter; see channel-api-adapter-reference-v1.md.
manual: Call POST /api/functions/api-channel-adapter with channel, taskType, costTarget; optional message and approved.
Inspect adapter lifecycle JSON; confirm policy blocks return adapter state.

releases.title: WhatsApp parity validator
releases.summary: Added WhatsApp parity rules and validator to enforce config consistency with adapter contract expectations and reduce channel-specific policy drift.
releases.details: Introduced whatsapp-adapter-parity-v1.md and scripts/validate-whatsapp-adapter.mjs with npm run adapter:whatsapp:validate.

releases.title: iMessage adapter architecture
releases.summary: Documented phased iMessage adapter architecture with provider boundaries, policy requirements, lifecycle behavior, and production-readiness gates.
releases.details: Added imessage-adapter-architecture-v1.md with canonical event model, rollout phases, and acceptance checks.
manual: Review architecture phases A to D.
Implement each phase with exit-gate evidence.

releases.title: Email adapter architecture
releases.summary: Defined Email adapter provider strategy, canonical event mapping, policy controls, and reliability constraints to prepare safe implementation rollout.
releases.details: Added email-adapter-architecture-v1.md and linked it from adapter contract and README index.

releases.title: Discord adapter architecture
releases.summary: Specified Discord transport architecture for gateway events, interactions, and outbound delivery with deterministic policy and reliability behavior.
releases.details: Added discord-adapter-architecture-v1.md and mapped rollout phases with testable exit gates.
manual: Validate retries, rate-limit handling, and idempotency.

releases.title: Sovereign role taxonomy
releases.summary: Codified sovereign agent team roles and authority matrix to separate planning, implementation, review, testing, and release decision rights.
releases.details: Added sovereign-agent-role-taxonomy-v1.md including propose/decide/veto boundaries and handoff requirements.
manual: Assign work by defined role boundaries.

releases.title: Handoff schema + stage-gate enforcement
releases.summary: Implemented structured handoff schema and validation rules so inter-role transitions are auditable, deterministic, and machine-checkable.
releases.details: Added handoff-artifact-schema-v1.md, sample handoff JSON, and scripts/validate-handoff-artifact.mjs.
manual: Only progress when gate.decision is valid.

releases.title: Automated release gates
releases.summary: Mapped Definition of Done and testing requirements to automated release gates that fail fast when readiness evidence is incomplete or inconsistent.
releases.details: Added release-gates-dod-v1.md, sample release artifact, and scripts/validate-release-gates.mjs.
manual: Proceed only when all hard rules pass.

releases.title: External-channel policy engine
releases.summary: Implemented risk-tier policy engine for external channels with approval gating on high-risk actions and explicit operator-readable block reasons.
releases.details: Added external-channel-policy-engine module, validator script, and integrated policy checks into API adapter flow.

releases.title: Decision/action audit trail
releases.summary: Shipped append-only hash-chained audit pipeline recording policy, routing, and delivery events so tampering becomes detectable by validation.
releases.details: Added dashboard/lib/audit-trail.mjs, scripts/validate-audit-trail.mjs, and audit event integration in adapter flow.
manual: Generate runtime events through adapter calls.

releases.title: Reliability telemetry baseline
releases.summary: Added telemetry event schema and SLO summary metrics with API endpoint visibility for success rate, latency, blocked rate, and failure trends.
releases.details: Added reliability-telemetry module, summary endpoint /api/telemetry/summary, and seed/validate scripts.

releases.title: iMessage live bridge
releases.summary: Implemented live iMessage bridge endpoint for inbound event handling and outbound reply path, including policy, audit, telemetry, and idempotency.
releases.details: Added POST /api/channels/imessage/inbound backed by imessage adapter and lifecycle validation command.
manual: Confirm lifecycle response and delivery attempt.
